headline: Why BSX Stock Hands You So Much Cash Right Now
summary: The market is offering a steep discount on this medical device maker, but the price tag comes with a story about slowing growth. Here’s how to read it.

headline: Boston Scientific's Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock?
summary: BSX faces Q2 results with growth expected in key businesses, but lowered full-year guidance, cost pressures and weak stock performance cloud the outlook.

headline: Artisan Value Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Update
summary: Our bottom five contributors to return in Q2 were Accenture, CME Group, Salesforce, Boston Scientific and EOG Resources. Read more here.
